## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content performance, strategy updates, and explore new opportunities for Hotel Engine's content marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content focusing on specific industry pain points and using direct, "blue-collar" language is performing best](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [New opportunity identified for programmatic SEO approach to room blocks/event bookings](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [FAQ schema markup recommended for improving LLM visibility and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Steady growth observed in LLM referrals, particularly from ChatGPT and Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes and Introductions

  - [Darrell is leaving GrowthX for a new opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Kyle introduced as temporary replacement, bringing extensive experience in client services and sales](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Cole from Hotel Engine joined, leading marketing for RoomBlocks initiative](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Overall traffic shows slow, steady increase](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Best-converting content (7% conversion rate) is wedding room block related](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Expense management and practical "how-to" guides performing well](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Industry-specific content seeing some decline, but opportunities exist for targeted approaches](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Content using corporate jargon (e.g., "streamline," "optimize") performing poorly](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

### Content Strategy Refinements

  - [Focus on blue-collar directness and real-world pain points for project-based crews](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Develop more granular, industry-specific bulk booking guides](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Create clustered content around specific travel challenges](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Emphasize problem-solving and practical financial content](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

### LLM Optimization

  - [Specific, direct answers favored by LLMs like ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [Structured FAQ schema recommended for improved visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Content structure should focus on question-and-answer format](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

### RoomBlocks Initiative

  - [New site planned for room block bookings](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Airbnb-style interface proposed with search functionality and curated listings](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Potential to include venue listings (wedding venues, meeting spaces, etc.) in the future](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Need to ensure consistent imagery and content from marketing to product pages](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joel to send specific industry pain points document to the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Carrie to flag any concerning content for Joel's review during refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Joel to provide raw data for deeper traffic analysis if possible](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [GrowthX to help implement FAQ schema markup](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Marcel (GrowthX) to be contacted about joining next week's call to discuss programmatic SEO approach for RoomBlocks](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
  - [Cole and Joel to prepare ICP information for the RoomBlocks initiative](https://fathom.video/share/ARaM_sLBVnk6gnE17NF7d1dFSv_8Fdod?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
